chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA No. 164 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on CMA No. 8744/2024 3. For hearing of Main Case 10.02.2026 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Abdul Hafeez ITO Zone-II Karachi Under instructions learned counsel for the applicant does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad PS
